## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Check system...
3. See error...

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or error logs.

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 130]
